Request Diagnosis

Independent Paid Media Auditor • Las Vegas

Forensic paid media diagnosis
for operators who need to justify spend.

I evaluate advertising as a business system.
Revenue, sales friction, capital allocation.
Not as a channel problem.

Flat-fee. No percentage of spend. No incentive to recommend more spending.

Request Diagnosis

See pricing →

48-hour engagement start No retainer required Independent, flat fee Discretion guaranteed
$18K+¹
Avg. monthly waste identified Avg. waste found
5 days²
Typical turnaround
100%

0%
Commission on your ad spend Commission on spend

¹Results based on completed audits. Results vary by account structure, market, and spend profile.
²Turnaround varies by scope: 3-5 days for single-platform, up to 10-14 days for enterprise-level engagements.

I have been accountable for revenue, payroll, and outcomes. Not just performance metrics. I've watched a quarter's pipeline collapse because a 'successful' campaign drove leads that couldn't close. That experience shapes how I evaluate advertising.

Businesses spending $10k to $1M+ monthly don't need encouragement. They need confidence their capital is working. That requires judgment from someone with no incentive to increase spend.

01

This Is Verification. Not Performance Tuning.

I determine whether paid media performance survives contact with reality.

Did advertising make the business materially better? That's the revenue question.
Did leads improve sales productivity or degrade it? That's the sales behavior question.
Do reported conversions represent real economic events? That's the attribution question.
Is spend justified by evidence or habit? That's the capital allocation question.

Most audits stop at the first question. I don't stop until I can answer all four.

Dashboards lie. Consequences don't.

02

What Surfaces in the First Diagnosis

Conversion tracking firing on page views instead of actual purchases. Search terms consuming budget that will never convert. Audience overlap inflating frequency without expanding reach.

Attribution models crediting last-click when conversion happened three touchpoints earlier. Landing pages misaligned with ad intent. Bid strategies optimizing for platform efficiency, not business outcomes.

These patterns appear in nearly every account I examine. Not because anyone's doing a bad job. Because platforms are designed to obscure them.

None of this is obvious in platform dashboards. That's the point.

03

Diagnosis starts at $1,250. Flat fee.

Campaign-level, cross-channel, or full revenue system scope. You receive a written evaluation with waste quantified in dollars, a video walkthrough, and a prioritized action list. Money-back guarantee if no inefficiency found.

See all service tiers and pricing →
04

Stop Wondering. Get the Verdict.

Request a diagnosis. I'll tell you whether your ad spend is producing business outcomes or just dashboard activity.

Request Diagnosis

Guarantee terms: Refund applies when diagnosis produces no material findings. Findings defined as campaign, structure, tracking, bidding, or spend inefficiencies. Refund applies to diagnosis fee only.

BUT DID YOU WIN

Independent paid media auditor delivering verdicts, not pitches.
